calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Request For Extraordinary Fees
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Objector and Beneficiary, Almone Legall. Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio as Petitioner in pro per.
Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated and responded to the court the details of the services provided, and also stated that the information was re-created from the notes in the file.

Ms. Jagiello argued that the services provided were not extraordinary services and attorney's fees should not be granted.
The Court stated that Ms. Fisher-Kouadio had to limit the fees as the administrator not as an attorney, and that she should submit a declaration. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio elected to submit the matter.
The matter was taken under submission, Ms. Jagiello to prepare the Order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for and with Almone LeGall. Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio in Pro Per.

Ms. Jagiello expressed disagreement with the amount of fees being requested by Ms. Fisher-Kouadio. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio explained the extent of services she provided. The Court suggested Ms. Kouadio request extraordinary fees and stated that it could not allow double fees. Ms. Jagiello waived notice for the hearing on extraordinary fees to be heard on February 20, 2008. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio is to file her request for extraordinary fees by February 1st. The Court ordered a preliminary distribution for the purpose of transferring the property, and allowed for statutory fees to be paid from escrow. Ms. Jagiello will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Obi.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Continued To Dec-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio appearing for petitioner. Unable to locate the named executor. Court signed an order dispensing notice to David Patterson. Petitioner is the sole heir. Petition is granted. Court is appointing Ms. Fisher-Kouadio as the administrator with will annexed with no bond. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Continued To May-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
